## Type of change

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify the change? Tests added or updated? -->

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` is clean

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] No proprietary compression internals or trade-secret information added
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] Public-facing docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] Commits squashable / one logical change per commit
